description_long: This rocking chair features a modern, minimalist design with a continuous, flowing frame made from bent wood, giving it a sculptural and organic appearance. The seat and backrest are formed from a single, smooth, white surface that curves seamlessly from the headrest to the footrest, providing ergonomic support. The wooden frame is finished in a light, natural tone, contrasting elegantly with the sleek white seat. The armrests are integrated into the frame, following the same undulating curves as the rest of the chair. The base consists of two wide, curved runners that allow for gentle rocking motion. The overall construction suggests a blend of Scandinavian and contemporary design influences, making it suitable for stylish urban parks, modern patios, or public lounges.
description: A modern rocking chair with a bent wood frame and a smooth, white, continuous seat and backrest. The chair features integrated armrests and wide curved runners for rocking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved wooden frame and the smooth, white seat surface, with armrests visible on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, the integrated armrest, and the full length of the curved wooden runner base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the white seat and the parallel wooden runners, emphasizing the chair's sturdy construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the flowing seat curve, armrest, and the full profile of the curved runner.
